subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy call hath attained to the hearing of the Wronged One, and thine allegiance hath been honored by the gaze of the Desired One. Be thou not sorrowful for that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ندایت باصغای مظلوم فائز و اقبالت بلحاظ مقصود مشرف محزون مباش از آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
